SEARCH
Package com.example.helios.service

Class ProfileService

java.lang.Object
com.example.helios.service.ProfileService
public class ProfileService extends Object
Service responsible for user profile bootstrap, completion, role synchronization, and notification/sign-in preferences for the current device user.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ProfileService.BootstrapResult
     
    static interface 
    ProfileService.InstallationIdSource
    Result object for the profile bootstrapping process.

    Method
    Description
    void
    bootstrapCurrentUser(android.content.Context context, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<ProfileService.BootstrapResult> onSuccess, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
    Bootstraps the current user's profile.

    completeCurrentProfile(android.content.Context context, String name, String email, String phone, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfile> onSuccess, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
    Completes the current user's profile with personal details.
    void
    completeCurrentProfileWithPhoto(android.content.Context context, String name, String email, String phone, String profileImageUrl, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfile> onSuccess, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
    Completes the current user's profile and replaces the stored profile photo URL.

    Deletes the profile of the current user, along with all events they organized.

    Deletes a user profile by UID, along with all events they organized.

    • ProfileService

      public ProfileService(@NonNull FirebaseRepository repository)

      public ProfileService(@NonNull AuthDeviceService authDeviceService, @NonNull UserRepository userRepository, @NonNull EventRepository eventRepository)

    • ProfileService

      public ProfileService(@NonNull AuthDeviceService authDeviceService, @NonNull UserRepository userRepository, @NonNull EventRepository eventRepository, @NonNull ProfileService.InstallationIdSource installationIdSource)

  • Method Details

    • bootstrapCurrentUser

      public void bootstrapCurrentUser(@NonNull android.content.Context context, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<ProfileService.BootstrapResult> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Bootstraps the current user's profile. This includes ensuring the user is signed in, checking for an existing profile, and creating a default one if necessary. It also syncs the user's role based on their device's admin status.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the BootstrapResult.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • ensureSignedIn

      public void ensureSignedIn(@NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<com.google.firebase.auth.FirebaseUser> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Ensures the user is signed in.
      Parameters:
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the FirebaseUser.
      onFailure - Callback for failed authentication.

    • completeCurrentProfile

      public void completeCurrentProfile(@NonNull android.content.Context context, @NonNull String name, @NonNull String email, String phone, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfile> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Completes the current user's profile with personal details.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      name - The user's name.
      email - The user's email address.
      phone - The user's phone number.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the updated UserProfile.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • completeCurrentProfileWithPhoto

      public void completeCurrentProfileWithPhoto(@NonNull android.content.Context context, @NonNull String name, @NonNull String email, String phone, String profileImageUrl, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfile> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Completes the current user's profile and replaces the stored profile photo URL.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      name - The user's name.
      email - The user's email address.
      phone - The user's phone number.
      profileImageUrl - The uploaded profile image URL.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the updated UserProfile.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • loadCurrentProfile

      public void loadCurrentProfile(@NonNull android.content.Context context, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfile> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Loads the current user's profile.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the UserProfile.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • updateCurrentProfilePhoto

      public void updateCurrentProfilePhoto(@NonNull android.content.Context context, String profileImageUrl, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfile> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Updates only the current user's stored profile image URL.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      profileImageUrl - The uploaded profile image URL.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the updated UserProfile.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getUserProfile

      public void getUserProfile(@NonNull String uid, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfile> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves a user profile by UID.
      Parameters:
      uid - The unique identifier of the user.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the UserProfile.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • requiresProfileCompletion

      public boolean requiresProfileCompletion(@NonNull UserProfile profile)
      Checks if the profile requires completion (i.e., missing name or email).
      Parameters:
      profile - The user profile to check.
      Returns:
      True if information is missing, false otherwise.

    • deleteCurrentProfile

      public void deleteCurrentProfile(@NonNull android.content.Context context, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Deletes the profile of the current user, along with all events they organized. Events are deleted first; the user document is only removed once all event deletions complete successfully.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • getAllProfiles

      public void getAllProfiles(@NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<UserProfile>> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves all user profiles.
      Parameters:
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the list of user profiles.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • deleteProfile

      public void deleteProfile(@NonNull String uid, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Deletes a user profile by UID, along with all events they organized. Events are deleted first; the user document is only removed once all event deletions complete successfully.
      Parameters:
      uid - The unique identifier of the user to delete.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • setNotificationsMuted

      public void setNotificationsMuted(@NonNull android.content.Context context, boolean muted, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Updates the notification mute status for the current user.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      muted - True to mute notifications, false to enable.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • setSignInBannerEnabled

      public void setSignInBannerEnabled(@NonNull android.content.Context context, boolean enabled, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Updates whether the sign-in banner is enabled for the current user.
      Parameters:
      context - The application context.
      enabled - True to show the banner, false to hide it.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • setOrganizerAccessRevoked

      public void setOrganizerAccessRevoked(@NonNull String uid, boolean revoked, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Updates whether organizer access is blocked for the given user profile.
      Parameters:
      uid - The unique identifier of the user to update.
      revoked - True to block organizer access, false to restore it.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.
